pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H. It’s a bit surreal being in this room with everyone, isn't it? What's your name?
Hey H, I'm I. It definitely feels a bit strange, but I’m just trying to stay focused. What brought you here?
Honestly, I'm just here for the money; I've got people back home I want to take care of, and this feels like a real chance to change things for us. What about you?
Same here. I’ve got people back home counting on me, and I’m determined to do whatever it takes to help them out.
I hear you. It’s a lot of pressure, but having people to fight for makes all the difference.
It really does. It keeps the motivation high when things get tough. Have you had a chance to talk to any of the others yet?
A bit, but everyone seems pretty guarded so far. It’s hard to get a read on people when there's this much on the line. Have you?
You're actually the first person I've really talked to. It's definitely tense; feels like everyone is just watching and waiting to see what happens next.
I get that. It's like everyone's sizing each other up. At least we've broken the ice a bit, it makes the waiting a little easier.
Definitely. It’s been good talking to you, H. I’m going to go circulate a bit more and see what else I can find out. Catch you later.
Sounds good, I. Good luck talking to the others, and hopefully we can both come out of this on top for our families. Catch you later.

post_game.message: Perfect coordination! Glad we all took the fair share.
Agreed, it was a pleasure coordinating for a fair result.
